title: Advanced Software Development Skills Path - Planned | Skill-Wanderer
description: Advanced Software Development Skills learning path coming soon. Master data structures, algorithms, mathematics, computer internals, low-level design, security, and DevSecOps.
plainText:
Advanced Software Development Skills Path Master the Core Foundations of Expert Engineering Elevate your skills with advanced computer science fundamentals. Master data structures, algorithms, discrete mathematics, computer internals, and security practices that distinguish senior engineers. 📋 Planned 🔜 Coming Soon 📝 Curriculum Subject to Change 🎓 Path Planned We're planning a comprehensive advanced software development curriculum that will equip you with the deep technical knowledge essential for senior-level engineering roles and technical interviews at top companies. This path is in the planning phase and development will begin soon. Core Areas Covered: 🧮 Data Structures & Algorithms Arrays, linked lists, trees, graphs, dynamic programming, sorting, searching, and complexity analysis 📐 Mathematics for Developers Discrete math, logic, probability, statistics, linear algebra, and mathematical problem-solving ⚙️ Computer Internals Memory management, CPU architecture, operating systems, compilers, and how code executes 🌐 System Design Scalability, load balancing, caching strategies, database design, and distributed systems 🔒 Security Fundamentals Application security, OWASP Top 10, secure coding practices, authentication, and encryption 🛡️ DevSecOps Security automation, vulnerability scanning, secrets management, and secure CI/CD pipelines Be the First to Know Join our community to get notified when the Advanced Software Development Skills path launches. You'll receive updates on course development and early access opportunities. Get Notified Explore Front-End Development Path

title: Back-End Development Path - Coming Soon | Skill-Wanderer
description: Back-End Development learning path. Learn Git, Node.js, databases, APIs, security, and cloud deployment from fundamentals to professional mastery.
plainText:
Back-End Development Path Build Powerful Server-Side Applications Master server-side programming, databases, APIs, and cloud infrastructure. Learn to build scalable, secure, and efficient back-end systems that power modern applications. 🎯 6 Comprehensive Courses 🔜 Coming Soon 📝 Curriculum Subject to Change Learning Path Overview A structured journey from version control to building production-ready server applications Foundation 2 Courses Git version control and back-end programming fundamentals Git In Development Data & APIs 2 Courses Database design and RESTful API development Coming Soon Security & Deployment 2 Courses Authentication, security, and application deployment Coming Soon Course 1: Git & Version Control Master the essential tool every developer needs 1 Git & Version Control Fundamentals In Development Objective: Learn to track changes, collaborate with others, and manage your codebase professionally using Git. What You'll Learn: Git basics: init, add, commit, status, and log Branching and merging strategies Working with remote repositories (GitHub, GitLab) Resolving merge conflicts Best practices for commit messages and workflows Start Learning Git Course 2: Back-End Programming Build the foundation for server-side development 2 Back-End Programming Fundamentals Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Learn server-side programming to build scalable back-end applications. What You'll Learn: Server-side programming concepts and architecture Request/response lifecycle Working with modules and packages Web framework fundamentals Middleware and routing patterns Error handling and logging Course 3: Database Design & Management Store and manage data effectively 3 SQL & Database Fundamentals Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Master database design principles and SQL to build robust data storage solutions. What You'll Learn: Relational database concepts and design SQL: queries, joins, and aggregations Database normalization and modeling PostgreSQL or MySQL fundamentals NoSQL databases (MongoDB basics) ORMs and database integration Course 4: API Development Create robust interfaces for your applications 4 RESTful API Design & Development Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Design and build professional RESTful APIs that are scalable, secure, and well-documented. What You'll Learn: REST principles and API design patterns HTTP methods, status codes, and headers Request validation and error handling API documentation with OpenAPI/Swagger Rate limiting and pagination API versioning strategies Course 5: Authentication & Security Protect your applications and user data 5 Security Best Practices Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Implement secure authentication and protect your applications from common vulnerabilities. What You'll Learn: Authentication vs Authorization JWT tokens and session management OAuth 2.0 and social login integration Password hashing and encryption OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities Input validation and SQL injection prevention Course 6: Application Deployment Deploy and scale your applications 6 Application Deployment Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Learn to deploy, monitor, and scale your back-end applications. What You'll Learn: Deployment strategies and best practices Container basics with Docker Environment configuration and secrets Logging and monitoring Performance optimization and caching Basic scaling strategies Our Learning Philosophy 🛠️ Learn by Building Build real APIs and services throughout the course. Complete projects that demonstrate professional back-end skills. 📈 Progressive Complexity Start with simple endpoints and gradually build up to secure, scalable production systems. 💼 Industry-Ready Skills Learn the tools, patterns, and practices used by professional back-end developers in real companies. Be the First to Know Join our community to get notified when the Back-End Development path launches. You'll receive updates on course development and early access opportunities. Start with Git Explore Front-End Development Path

Back-End Development learning path. Learn Git, Node.js, databases, APIs, security, and cloud deployment from fundamentals to professional mastery.

title: Front-End Development Path | Skill-Wanderer
description: Learn front-end development from Git to modern frameworks. Master HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and build beautiful, interactive web applications.
plainText:
Front-End Development Path Build Beautiful, Interactive Web Experiences A comprehensive journey from version control fundamentals to modern front-end frameworks. Learn to create stunning, responsive websites and web applications step by step. 🎯 5 Comprehensive Courses 💎 Path In Development Learning Path Overview A structured progression from essential tools to advanced front-end development Foundation 2 Courses Git version control and HTML structure - the building blocks of web development In Development Styling & Interactivity 2 Courses CSS styling and JavaScript programming to bring your websites to life CSS In Development / JS Planned Modern Frameworks 1 Course Build scalable applications with modern front-end frameworks Planned Course 1: Git & Version Control Master the essential tool every developer needs 1 Git & Version Control Fundamentals In Development Objective: Learn to track changes, collaborate with others, and manage your codebase professionally using Git. What You'll Learn: Git basics: init, add, commit, status, and log Branching and merging strategies Working with remote repositories (GitHub, GitLab) Resolving merge conflicts Best practices for commit messages and workflows Start Learning Git Course 2: HTML - The Structure of the Web Build the skeleton of every web page 2 HTML Fundamentals & Semantic Markup In Development Objective: Master HTML to create well-structured, accessible, and SEO-friendly web pages. What You'll Learn: HTML document structure and essential tags Semantic HTML5 elements (header, nav, main, article, section, footer) Forms and input elements Tables, lists, and media elements Accessibility best practices (ARIA, alt text) Start Learning HTML Course 3: CSS & Styling Make your websites beautiful and responsive 3 CSS Fundamentals & Modern Layouts In Development Objective: Learn to style web pages with CSS, create responsive layouts, and implement modern design patterns. What You'll Learn: CSS selectors, properties, and the cascade Box model, positioning, and display properties Flexbox and CSS Grid for modern layouts Responsive design with media queries CSS animations and transitions CSS variables and modern features Start Learning CSS Course 4: JavaScript Add interactivity and dynamic behavior 4 JavaScript Programming & DOM Manipulation Planned - Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Master JavaScript to create interactive web experiences and understand programming fundamentals. What You'll Learn: Variables, data types, and operators Functions, scope, and closures Arrays, objects, and modern ES6+ features DOM manipulation and event handling Asynchronous JavaScript: Promises and async/await Fetching data from APIs Course 5: Front-End Frameworks Build scalable, modern web applications 5 Modern Front-End Frameworks Planned - Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Learn to build production-ready web applications using modern front-end frameworks and tools. What You'll Learn: Component-based architecture concepts React, Vue, or Angular fundamentals State management patterns Routing and navigation Build tools and bundlers (Vite, Webpack) Testing front-end applications Our Learning Philosophy 🛠️ Learn by Building Every concept is reinforced with hands-on projects. Build real websites as you learn, creating a portfolio along the way. 📈 Progressive Complexity Start with the basics and gradually build up. Each course prepares you for the next, ensuring no gaps in knowledge. 💼 Industry-Ready Skills Learn the tools and practices used by professional developers in real companies today. Begin Your Front-End Journey Start with Git fundamentals and work your way up to building modern web applications Start with Git Explore Other Paths Visit dojo.skill-wanderer.com for all available courses and learning resources.
Front-End Development Path | Skill-Wanderer
Learn front-end development from Git to modern frameworks. Master HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and build beautiful, interactive web applications.

title: Mobile & Multi-Platform Game Development Path - Coming Soon | Skill-Wanderer
description: Learn mobile and multi-platform game development with Dart, Flutter, and Flame. Build 2D games that run on iOS, Android, Web, and desktop platforms.
plainText:
Mobile & Multi-Platform Game Development Path Create Games That Play Everywhere Master game development from fundamentals to distribution. Learn Dart, Flutter, and Flame to build beautiful 2D games that run on mobile, desktop, and web platforms. 🎮 5 Comprehensive Courses 💎 In Development Learning Path Overview A structured journey from version control to publishing your games worldwide Foundation 2 Courses Git version control and Dart programming - the building blocks of Flutter development Git In Development / Dart Coming Soon Framework & Engine 2 Courses Flutter for cross-platform UI and Flame for 2D game development In Development Launch & Monetize 1 Course Publish your games to app stores and reach players worldwide Coming Soon Course 1: Git & Version Control Master the essential tool every developer needs 1 Git & Version Control Fundamentals In Development Objective: Learn to track changes, collaborate with others, and manage your game projects professionally using Git. What You'll Learn: Git basics: init, add, commit, status, and log Branching and merging strategies Working with remote repositories (GitHub, GitLab) Resolving merge conflicts Best practices for game project version control Start Learning Git Course 2: Dart Programming Language The foundation of Flutter and Flame development 2 Dart Programming Fundamentals Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Master Dart programming to build a solid foundation for Flutter and game development. What You'll Learn: Variables, data types, and operators Control flow and functions Object-oriented programming in Dart Collections: Lists, Maps, and Sets Asynchronous programming with Futures and Streams Null safety and modern Dart features Course 3: Flutter Framework Build beautiful cross-platform applications 3 Flutter Development Essentials In Development Objective: Learn Flutter to create stunning, high-performance apps that run on mobile, web, and desktop. What You'll Learn: Flutter architecture and widget system Building layouts with Material and Cupertino widgets State management patterns Navigation and routing Working with assets, animations, and gestures Platform-specific customizations Start Learning Flutter Course 4: Flame & 2D Game Development Create engaging games with the Flame engine 4 2D Game Development with Flame In Development Objective: Master the Flame game engine to build complete 2D games with physics, animations, and audio. What You'll Learn: Flame engine fundamentals and game loop Sprites, animations, and sprite sheets Collision detection and physics Input handling: touch, keyboard, and gamepad Audio and sound effects integration Building complete game projects (platformer, shooter, puzzle) Start Learning Flame Course 5: Game Distribution Publish and monetize your games 5 Publishing & Monetization Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Learn to prepare, publish, and monetize your games across multiple platforms and app stores. What You'll Learn: Preparing your game for release (optimization, testing) Publishing to Google Play Store Publishing to Apple App Store Web and desktop distribution options Monetization strategies: ads, in-app purchases, premium Analytics and player feedback integration Our Learning Philosophy 🎮 Learn by Creating Games Every concept is reinforced by building actual games. Complete multiple game projects throughout the path. 📈 Progressive Complexity Start with simple mechanics and gradually build up to complete game systems with physics, AI, and more. 🌍 Cross-Platform from Day One Build once, deploy everywhere. Your games will run on iOS, Android, Web, Windows, macOS, and Linux. Be the First to Know Join our community to get notified when the Mobile & Game Development path launches. You'll receive updates on course development and early access opportunities. Get Notified Explore Front-End Development Path
Mobile & Multi-Platform Game Development Path - Coming Soon | Skill-Wanderer

title: Project Management Path - Coming Soon | Skill-Wanderer
description: Project Management learning path. Learn PM foundations, core skills, Agile methodologies, real-world execution, scaling, and the PM mindset.
plainText:
Project Management Path Lead Teams to Success Master the art and science of project management. Learn methodologies, tools, and leadership skills to deliver projects on time, within budget, and beyond expectations. 📊 6 Comprehensive Courses 🔜 Coming Soon 📝 Curriculum Subject to Change Learning Path Overview A structured journey from PM fundamentals to leading complex projects Foundation 2 Courses PM fundamentals and core project management skills Coming Soon Modern PM 2 Courses Agile methodologies and real-world execution skills Coming Soon Leadership 2 Courses Advanced scaling techniques and the PM mindset Coming Soon Course 1: Foundations Build a solid foundation in project management principles 1 Project Management Foundations Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Understand the fundamentals of project management and establish a strong foundation for your PM journey. What You'll Learn: What is project management and why it matters Project lifecycle phases and milestones Key PM terminology and concepts Introduction to PM methodologies (Waterfall, Agile, Hybrid) Understanding roles and responsibilities in projects Project success criteria and metrics Course 2: Core Project Management Skills Master the essential skills every project manager needs 2 Core Project Management Skills Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Develop the core competencies required to plan, execute, and control projects effectively. What You'll Learn: Project planning and work breakdown structures Estimation techniques and scheduling Resource allocation and management Budget planning and cost control Risk identification and mitigation strategies Stakeholder communication and reporting Course 3: Agile & Modern Project Management Embrace modern methodologies for today's dynamic projects 3 Agile & Modern Project Management Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Master Agile principles and modern PM practices to lead adaptive, high-performing teams. What You'll Learn: Agile principles and the Agile Manifesto Scrum framework: roles, events, and artifacts Kanban methodology and flow optimization Sprint planning, daily standups, and retrospectives User stories, backlog management, and prioritization Hybrid approaches: combining Agile with traditional methods Course 4: Real-World Execution Skills Navigate the challenges of real project environments 4 Real-World Execution Skills Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Learn to handle real-world project challenges and execute successfully in complex environments. What You'll Learn: Managing scope creep and change requests Conflict resolution and difficult conversations Working with distributed and remote teams PM tools and technology (Jira, Asana, Monday.com) Status tracking, dashboards, and reporting Project recovery and turnaround strategies Course 5: Advanced & Scaling Up Lead larger programs and complex initiatives 5 Advanced & Scaling Up Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Scale your PM skills to manage programs, portfolios, and enterprise-level initiatives. What You'll Learn: Program management vs project management Portfolio management and strategic alignment Scaled Agile frameworks (SAFe, LeSS) Cross-functional and multi-team coordination Enterprise resource planning and capacity management Governance, compliance, and organizational change Course 6: PM Mindset Develop the mindset and soft skills of exceptional leaders 6 The PM Mindset Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Cultivate the mindset, emotional intelligence, and leadership qualities that set great PMs apart. What You'll Learn: Leadership styles and situational leadership Emotional intelligence for project managers Building trust and psychological safety in teams Continuous improvement and learning mindset Career development and PM certifications Personal productivity and time management Our Learning Philosophy 🎯 Practical Application Learn through real-world scenarios and case studies that prepare you for actual project challenges. 📈 Progressive Complexity Start with fundamentals and progressively build to advanced program and portfolio management. 👥 People-Centric Leadership Great projects are delivered by great teams. Learn to lead, motivate, and empower your people. Be the First to Know Join our community to get notified when the Project Management path launches. You'll receive updates on course development and early access opportunities. Get Notified Explore Front-End Development Path

title: QA / Tester Path - Coming Soon | Skill-Wanderer
description: QA and Software Testing learning path. Learn testing fundamentals, black box testing, grey box testing, exploratory testing, and quality engineering concepts.
plainText:
QA / Tester Path Ensure Quality at Every Step Master software testing methodologies, critical thinking, and quality assurance best practices. Progress from testing fundamentals to advanced quality engineering concepts that drive product excellence. 🔍 5 Comprehensive Courses 💎 In Development Learning Path Overview A structured journey from testing fundamentals to quality engineering mastery Foundation 2 Courses Testing fundamentals, black box testing, and grey box testing techniques Coming Soon Advanced Testing 2 Courses Exploratory testing, non-functional testing, and product thinking Coming Soon Quality Engineering 1 Course Automation strategy and quality engineering concepts Coming Soon Course 1: Testing Fundamentals & Black Box Testing Build a solid foundation in software testing principles 1 Testing Fundamentals & Black Box Testing Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Learn the core principles of software testing and master black box testing techniques to validate software behavior. What You'll Learn: Software testing fundamentals and terminology Test planning and test case design Black box testing techniques (equivalence partitioning, boundary value analysis) Decision tables and state transition testing Bug reporting and defect lifecycle Test documentation and traceability Course 2: Grey Box Testing Bridge the gap between black box and white box approaches 2 Grey Box Testing Techniques Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Learn to leverage partial system knowledge to design more effective tests that uncover hidden defects. What You'll Learn: Grey box testing concepts and when to apply them Database testing and data validation API testing fundamentals Integration testing strategies Understanding system architecture for better testing Log analysis and debugging techniques Course 3: Exploratory Testing & Advanced Thinking + Non-Functional Testing Develop advanced testing skills and critical thinking 3 Exploratory Testing & Non-Functional Testing Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Master exploratory testing techniques and learn to evaluate software beyond functional requirements. What You'll Learn: Exploratory testing methodology and session-based testing Advanced thinking and heuristics for testers Performance testing fundamentals Security testing basics Usability and accessibility testing Reliability, scalability, and maintainability considerations Course 4: Product & Business Thinking Align testing with business goals and user needs 4 Product & Business Thinking for Testers Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Develop a product mindset to prioritize testing efforts and deliver maximum business value. What You'll Learn: Understanding business requirements and user personas Risk-based testing and prioritization User journey mapping and critical path analysis Metrics that matter: quality indicators and KPIs Communicating quality to stakeholders Balancing quality, speed, and cost tradeoffs Course 5: Automation Strategy & Quality Engineering (Conceptual) Strategic thinking for modern quality assurance 5 Automation Strategy & Quality Engineering Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Learn to think strategically about test automation and quality engineering to build sustainable quality practices. What You'll Learn: Test automation strategy and ROI considerations The test automation pyramid and when to automate Continuous testing and CI/CD integration concepts Quality engineering mindset and shift-left testing Building a quality culture in teams Future trends in quality assurance Our Learning Philosophy 🔍 Think Like a Detective Develop critical thinking skills to uncover hidden defects and ask the right questions about software behavior. 📈 Progressive Complexity Start with testing fundamentals and gradually build up to strategic quality engineering concepts. 💼 Business-Focused Quality Learn to align testing efforts with business goals and communicate value to stakeholders. Be the First to Know Join our community to get notified when the QA/Tester path launches. You'll receive updates on course development and early access opportunities. Get Notified Explore Front-End Development Path
